Confluence — refinement variants

Direction E locked. Six executions; pick one (or mix: "e5 with e2's green current").

E1 — Baseline (as picked)

Top tributary green, deep current, under-run ends below the i.

E2 — Green current

The merged current itself takes Rindle Green - the durable output is the brand-colored element.

E3 — Carried bead

All strokes deep; one green asset bead rides the current under the letters.

E4 — Long green current

Green current running on beneath "rin" - more underline presence.

E5 — River junction

Tributaries enter like a watershed (steep, level, rising) + green bead riding the current.

E6 — River junction, green top

Watershed tributaries with the green on the entering stream (closest to the original).
